What We Create

Every scene.
Every level.
Every brand.

01
◈
Film & Series

Main titles, character themes, action cues, chase sequences, emotional underscore, end credits. A complete score — from the opening frame to the last.

02
◉
Game Score

Main menu, loading screens, ambient world themes, boss fights, combat loops, cutscenes. Music built for every moment of play — not just the trailer.

03
◆
Brand & Content

Sonic identity, ad campaigns, fashion films, social content, product launches. The sound people associate with you — across every format.

Process

How A
Score
Is Born

1

Reference Call

We dig into your world — visual references, emotional targets, what you want people to feel at every key moment of the project.

2

Motif Sketches

3 rough musical directions in 7 days. Not demos — emotional sketches. We find the DNA of your sound.

3

Full Production

Chosen direction developed to full production — live guitars, analog synths, sound design layered in.

4

Stems & Delivery

Full stems, alternate versions, loop-ready assets. You own everything completely.

Start
Your Score

Tell us about the project. We reply within 24 hours — not with a price list, but with first thoughts.
